name: Faith Of Life _ Survive Edition
short_description: Third-person combat shooter that mixes zombies, action, horror, and sci-fi elements. It features two distinct missions' modes and an exhilarating arena. Enjoy and have a fantastic time!
detailed_description:
In this third-person combat shooter game, you'll experience a mix of zombie, action, horror, and sci-fi elements. There are two distinct missions modes available, including an exhilarating arena mode.

Missions Mode:

  • There are two different missions systems in the game. The first mode involves zombies and organized soldiers as enemies. The second mode is a sci-fi narrative, featuring sci-fi creatures and soldiers as opponents. In both modes, you'll face various challenges as you fight to complete missions and advance through the game.

Arena Mode:

  • In the arena mode, you can choose which area you want to play in. There are four arena areas with different enemies and challenges. In each arena area, you will face waves of enemies. Complete the waves to earn more achievements.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
